assertions.title: Run transcript terminal style

steps.expected: Transcript renders terminal-style color coding with reasoning=--fg-muted, tool calls=--warn with $, errors=--dead
steps.observed: Page loaded and transcript was visible in both nice and raw modes.

steps.action: Probe visible transcript lines in nice mode
steps.expected: Reasoning text uses --fg-muted; tool-call lines with $ use --warn; error lines use --dead
steps.observed: Reasoning line "I found AGENT_HOME..." resolved to rgb(255,255,255) at 16px; transcript line "$ Executed command" resolved to rgb(255,255,255) at 16px; error line "Cannot assign work to pending approval agents" resolved to rgb(255,255,255) at 15px. These do not match --fg-muted rgba(255,255,255,0.68), --warn rgb(232,213,96), --dead rgb(255,96,96).

steps.action: Toggle raw mode and re-probe transcript styling
steps.expected: Raw transcript still preserves required muted/warn/dead mapping
steps.observed: Raw transcript reasoning sample resolved to oklab(.../0.8) (not --fg-muted), no $-prefixed warn-colored tool sample was present, and error-like sample did not resolve to --dead.

assertions.issues: Transcript color mapping still does not satisfy the contract for reasoning/tool-call/error styling.

steps.action: Open /WEA/issues/WEA-1 on Comments tab and capture screenshot
steps.expected: Comment thread renders with monospace typography and design-system hierarchy
steps.observed: Issue detail comments loaded with fixture comments and metadata rows.

steps.action: Audit computed styles for author, timestamp, content, and separator
steps.expected: Author=--fg weight 500, timestamp=--fg-dim, content=--fg-muted, and 1px border separators
steps.observed: Author "You" = rgb(255,255,255), 12px, weight 500; timestamp "Apr 3, 2026, 8:29 AM" = rgba(255,255,255,0.4); comment body "Validation fixture comment 1..." = rgba(255,255,255,0.68); separator host has border-bottom 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18). All sampled elements used JetBrains Mono.

assertions.title: Brutalist properties panel

steps.action: Inspect properties panel key/value rows on /WEA/issues/WEA-1
steps.expected: Keys are --fg-dim 10px monospace and values are --fg 10px monospace
steps.observed: Lower key/value rows match spec (e.g., "Created by" = 10px fg-dim; "Me" and date values = 10px fg).

steps.expected: Values also comply with 10px value typography requirement
steps.observed: Buttons "BLOCKED", "Medium", "No labels", "CE CEO", and "Onboarding" resolved to 11px JetBrains Mono (not 10px).
Sampled property controls resolved to borderRadius 0px.

evidence.network: Captured GET document/script/fetch traffic including /WEA/issues/WEA-1 and recurring /api/health + company live-run/sidebar polling (gui-detail-polish/round-3b-group-b/VAL-GUI-ISSDET-003-network.txt).

assertions.issues: Properties panel value typography is still 11px for interactive fields, so the 10px value requirement is not fully met.

frictions.description: Initial AGDET network export returned "No requests captured" despite successful page render.
frictions.resolution: Reopened /WEA/agents/ceo/runs in the same dedicated session and recaptured network logs successfully.
